report.summary: Audited today's 40+ new learn guides and 5 ecosystem pages for UX issues; created 6 OG images for pages missing social sharing visuals; fixed BackToTop and OG metadata gaps on key pages.

sections.title: UX Audit Findings
items: Ecosystem pages (pendle, rocketpool, makerdao, ondo, yearn) are all client components missing metadata exports — no SEO metadata, OG images, or structured data
Web3 Gaming guide was missing OG image URL in openGraph definition — fixed
Portfolio Allocation guide was missing BackToTop component — added
No clamp() usage found across new pages — all use fixed pixel font sizing instead of fluid responsive typography
Ecosystem pages lack Table of Contents for long-form content
Grid layouts with hardcoded 2-column grids (e.g., Ondo RWA grid) may break on narrow mobile without media queries
Small touch targets (32x32) on numbered circles in portfolio guide need larger hit areas for mobile accessibility
Tokenized Real Estate guide has solid UX patterns: breadcrumbs, table of contents, BackToTop, responsive table with overflowX, structured data — good reference pattern
Pendle ecosystem page has dense inline styling and minified code — consider extracting styles for maintainability

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: ecosystem-pendle (1200x630) — Yield Trading theme with teal/purple accent, TVL $4.1B stats
OG image: ecosystem-rocketpool (1200x630) — Liquid Staking theme with orange accent, validator count stats
OG image: ecosystem-makerdao (1200x630) — Stablecoin/RWA theme with teal accent, TVL $8.5B stats
OG image: ecosystem-ondo (1200x630) — RWA/Institutional theme with indigo accent, USDY yield stats
OG image: ecosystem-yearn (1200x630) — Yield Optimizer theme with blue accent, vault count stats
OG image: learn-web3-gaming-gamefi-2026 (1200x630) — Gaming/GameFi theme with gradient accent, market size stats

sections.title: Code Fixes Applied
items: Added BackToTop import and component to web3-gaming-gamefi-guide-2026/page.tsx
Added BackToTop import and component to crypto-portfolio-allocation-guide-2026/page.tsx
Added OG image URL and images array to web3-gaming-gamefi-guide-2026 openGraph metadata
Updated OG image reference to match created SVG filename

sections.title: Recommendations for Next Cycle
items: CRITICAL: Ecosystem pages (pendle, rocketpool, makerdao, ondo, yearn) need refactoring to split server/client — extract metadata to a server page.tsx wrapper that imports the client component
Add clamp() fluid typography to h1 elements across all new learn guides for better mobile scaling
Add Table of Contents to ecosystem deep-dive pages for long-form navigation
Increase touch target size on numbered step circles from 32px to 44px minimum for mobile accessibility
Convert 6 new SVG OG images to PNG for broader social platform compatibility
